name: Spring Boot
description: An open-source Java-based framework used to create microservices and web apps. It simplifies development by offering auto-configuration, starter dependencies, and production-ready features.

name: React
description: Popular component-based JavaScript library for building responsive user interfaces, developed and maintained by Meta.

name: Next.js
description: Vercel-built React framework supporting Server-Side Rendering (SSR), Static Site Generation (SSG), and API routes out of the box.

name: FastAPI
description: Modern, fast (high-performance) web framework for building APIs with Python 3.8+ based on standard Python type hints.

name: Hibernate
description: Object-Relational Mapping (ORM) framework for Java, mapping object-oriented models to relational databases.
